3248330.name: City Of Stolen Worlds Demo
3248330.description:
[/p]

City of Stolen Worlds is a game with a rich narrative and unique locations. It’s an adventure game with elements of a visual novel: you’ll explore the City, interact with its inhabitants, and make decisions that lead to unexpected consequences and multiple endings.

🌚 Discover extraordinary worlds.

Get ready to explore eerie and breathtaking worlds where reality follows different rules. Twisted architecture lures you into the jaws of predatory streets. The insectoid civilization traps fading consciousness in layers of amber. And in the Theater of Spawn, a Flesh-performance is slowly taking shape. Dozens of surreal worlds are waiting for you.

🐙 Immerse yourself in an intriguing story.

How did you end up in this City, and why was your home stolen? Was it just a coincidence, or did the mysterious Master choose you for a reason? The City is full of bizarre inhabitants, each hiding their secrets, and each playing a part in this story. Who will you trust, and who should you fear? The choice is yours.

Spin a vibrant web of intrigue, secrets, and tough decisions. Tear the fabric of reality, create new lines of fate, and dare to step into the abyss.
